subject: Social Science
learning_outcomes: Explain the meaning and importance of rural development
Explain the importance of Panchayat Raj system
Explain the role of women in rural development

key_terms.definition: The process of improving the socio-economic and educational status of rural people by efficiently utilizing local resources
Gandhiji's concept of giving power and responsibility of village development to village people to develop self-reliant villages
The process of achieving village development by providing power and responsibility of the village to village people
Three-tier system of local self-government at village, taluk and district levels — implemented by 73rd Amendment

mcqs.question: 'The real development of India is the development of villages' was said by
mcqs.explanation: Mahatma Gandhi said the real development of India is the development of villages

mcqs.question: The Panchayat Raj system has been implemented through this amendment
mcqs.explanation: The 73rd Constitutional Amendment Act (1992) implemented the Panchayat Raj system

mcqs.question: The system brought into practice as per the 73rd amendment
mcqs.explanation: The 73rd Amendment established the three-tier Panchayat Raj system

one_mark_questions.question: What is Gram Swaraj?
one_mark_questions.answer: Gram Swaraj is the process of giving the power and responsibility of village development to the people of the village and developing the village into self-sufficient and prosperous villages

one_mark_questions.question: What is decentralization of power?
one_mark_questions.answer: Decentralization is the process of achieving village development by providing the power and responsibility of the village to the people of the village

one_mark_questions.question: Name the three levels of Panchayat Raj institutions.
one_mark_questions.answer: Zilla Panchayat, Taluk Panchayat, Grama Panchayat
